product.name: Amazon Basics Foldable Collapsible Shopping Utility Cart with 360-Degree Wheels, Multi-Functional for Sports, Easy Assembly, X-Large, Black
features: Foldable shopping utility cart for groceries, laundry, sports equipment, thrift stores, garden centers, and more
Includes an extra-large shopping utility cart made of durable metal with a black finish; 50-70 pound load capacity
Ample storage with 2 large baskets, plus a smaller basket that works well for personal items
Heavy duty wheels with 360-degree swivel front wheels for smooth mobility and easy maneuvering in any direction
Foam covered handle offers a soft, secure, comfortable grip
Collapsible for convenient carrying and compact storage
Product dimensions: 40.2 x 23.3 x 21.1 inches (assembled), 24.2 x 17.7 x 15.5 inches (big basket), 17.5 x 13.9 x 5.9 (small basket), 45.2 x 23.3 x 7.5 inches (folded)
